title: Stable Release To Local Build Upgrade
objective: Start a disposable OpenClaw env on the stable release track, upgrade it to a release-shaped local build, and verify the same migration/runtime behavior users would see when updating to the upcoming release.

phases.title: Start Stable Release Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable env through the real stable release track before upgrading to the local release-shaped runtime.

phases.title: Upgrade To Local Build
phases.intent: Run the real OpenClaw upgrade path to the release-shaped local build runtime.

phases.title: Post-Local-Build Upgrade Checks
phases.intent: Verify the local build handles plugin indexes, runtime deps, doctor recovery, and gateway readiness after upgrade.
evidence: gateway logs without missing dependency/plugin load failures
